## Summary

What does this change and why?

## Habitat-first check

Does this keep the home screen feeling like a habitat (not a dashboard)? If it touches Garden/Shelf/Journal, say how.

## Verification

- [ ] `pnpm typecheck`
- [ ] `pnpm test`
- [ ] `pnpm build`
- [ ] Manual smoke in the TUI (note which screens you touched)

## Screenshots / recordings

For visible changes, paste a before/after if you can.

## Notes for reviewers

Anything reviewers should know — risky areas, follow-ups, open questions.
